description: Settings window (PR #134 Sentinel 🔴-1): the default capability covers only the main window, so this window's event subscriptions (model-download-progress/complete/error, output-mode-changed) were ACL-rejected on every mount. Grants exactly what the window uses — event listen/unlisten (app-defined #[tauri::command]s aren't capability-gated) — deliberately narrower than main's core:default.
